markets.question: Spread: Aarhus GF (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game, scheduled for April 6 at 12:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Aarhus GF" if Aarhus GF win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Viborg FF".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on superligaen.dk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Viborg FF vs. Aarhus GF - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Denmark Superliga game, scheduled for April 6 at 12:00 PM ET.

markets.question: Cuiabá EC vs. Athletic Club: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Serie B game between Cuiabá EC and Athletic Club, scheduled for April 1 at 8:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Cuiabá EC and Athletic Club each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Viborg FF vs. Aarhus GF: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game between Viborg FF and Aarhus GF, scheduled for April 6 at 12:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Viborg FF and Aarhus GF combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
